<function=python>
<parameter=code>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The green with W is still at rows 30-32, cols 30-32. It didn't move! The RIGHT action didn't move the green because the purple wall is blocking it. The only change was a single cell at row 63, col 56 which is likely a HUD/timer element.
So the green can't move through the purple wall. I need to find another way to get to the right frame.
Let me reconsider the game mechanics:
1. Arrow keys move the green with W by 3 cells
2. MOUSE click on another green transfers the W marker
3. The green can't move through purple walls
4. The left frame has been "completed" (green with charcoal center inside)
Maybe the goal is to complete both frames. Since the green can't move through the wall, maybe I need to use MOUSE to click on the right frame to place a green there? Or maybe I need to click on the right frame to "activate" it?
Let me try clicking on the right dark frame (around row 28, col 46 - the center of the frame).
Wait, but the right frame is at rows 26-30, cols 44-48. The center would be around row 28, col 46. But the frame interior is at rows 27-29, cols 45-47.
Let me try clicking on the right frame's interior.

# The frame is at rows 26-30, cols 44-48
# Interior is rows 27-29, cols 45-47

</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
